name: The Hater
overview: ”Phapwat“ a rising star painter who is about to showcase her work in a prestigious gallery, sees her life turned upside down when old scandals and fabricated rumors surface on the internet. Driven by rage, she decides to transform from a ”painter“ into a ”killer,“ while a determined female police officer ”Phanwa“ relentlessly follows her every move.

trailers.title: FULL MOVIE | THE HATER จิต (ฆาต) กร
